assumptions: Thermo method is chosen deterministically before chapter drafting.
Thermo method is chosen deterministically before chapter drafting.

criteria.name: Data strength
criteria.justification: Method should maximize public-data support for critical thermodynamic values.

criteria.name: Auditability
criteria.justification: Home-paper quality requires a defendable, traceable method basis.

criteria.name: Execution speed
criteria.justification: Faster methods are preferred only when they do not weaken engineering credibility.

alternatives.description: Use direct public property and reaction data where available.
Use public correlations and interpolation around cited anchors.

outputs.fit: Best when direct thermodynamic data is incomplete but physical-property anchors exist.

alternatives.description: Use accepted estimation methods with conservative bounds.

outputs.fit: Fallback when public data is sparse.

alternatives.description: Use close-compound analogy as a provisional design basis.

decision.selected_summary: Use direct public property and reaction data where available. selected as the primary thermodynamic basis.
hard_constraint_results: High-sensitivity property gaps must be resolved or explicitly surfaced.
